bead.title: FEAT-025: Control Plane — multi-tenant management, BYOC support
bead.description: Lightweight management plane for multi-tenant Axon deployments. PostgreSQL-backed control plane for tenant lifecycle (provisioning, monitoring, deprovisioning). Supports BYOC model where customers run Axon in their own infrastructure. See FEAT-025.
bead.acceptance: New tenant provisioned via API; tenant health visible in dashboard; control plane never accesses tenant entity data; BYOC instance registers with control plane
